evidence.snippet: Leading manufacturer of subsea & UPS, ROV and AUV batteries. Various application areas, ranging from marine research and monitoring to offshore industrial oil and gas projects.
Li-ion batteries built in the Li-Ion PowerPack™ for AUVs and other vehicles

items.notes: Li-Ion batteries for AUVs, ROVs, and subsea applications; primary business line

evidence.snippet: A system with NetDI® data logger and sensors for connecting to ROV or AUV was developed for the offshore oil+gas industry and for scientific projects. The loggers collects the data of the sensors in real-time. Algorithm for identifying of substances are implemented.

ndaa.notes: German company; no NDAA 848/889 claim anywhere in corpus. Compliance page covers Gabler/Possehl Group conduct policies only.

blue_uas.notes: No Blue UAS or Blue sUAS mention anywhere in corpus.

evidence.snippet: With more than 15 years of experience, SubCtech has established its position among leading manufacturers of ocean and subsea technology for industry and science.

readiness.notes: Catalog SKUs with full specs, active production runs (e.g., 1 MWh battery systems being delivered to customers), large established client list.

tagline: German marine power and sensor specialist. Makes Li-Ion battery systems for AUVs and subsea platforms, plus environmental monitoring instruments (pCO2, water quality, data loggers). Production-ready across multiple product lines. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; no visible U.S. defense contracts in public record. Primary customer base appears civilian—research, aquaculture, offshore energy.
